message:
Fix additional bugs from deep code review

- serve.ts: Use ?? instead of || for limit to allow limit=0
- manifest.ts: Add defense-in-depth path validation in checkSkillModification
- PromptDetailModal.tsx: Fix TypeScript error with optional chaining on map

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
